who: law firm project managers processing 5–15 expense reports/month
offer: For law firm project managers processing 5–15 expense reports/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes budget overruns. We provide reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of legal case expenses with approved budgets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm project managers
Indie Hackers posts on expense reporting workflows
DM outreach to law firm project managers with demo video
Community forums where project managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of expense reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
